Index.title: American Technology Inside
Index.description: Premium orthotic solutions engineered in the USA.

LeapCore.name: LeapCore™
LeapCore.headline: Megafauna Physiology
LeapCore.body: Bi-density Polyurethane (PU) chassis. Combines a low-density top layer for immediate comfort and a high-density base with geometric memory. Maintains arch integrity for +8 hours, preventing knee valgus and pelvic imbalance.
LeapCore.stat: Valid for users up to 110 kg (220 lbs)

ThinBoom.name: ThinBoom™
ThinBoom.headline: The Reactive Tendon
ThinBoom.body: Supercritical E-TPU (Expanded Cell Elastomer) matrix of high rebound and minimal profile. Reduces hamstring and glute effort, delaying muscle fatigue and allowing a more agile and powerful gait.

PORON_XRD.name: PORON® XRD®
PORON_XRD.headline: Molecular Reaction Shield
PORON_XRD.body: Open-cell viscoelastic polymer. Molecules "freeze" instantly on impact to dissipate energy and regain flexibility when walking. Acts as a shield for joints, preventing harmful vibrations.
PORON_XRD.stat: Neutralizes up to 90% of impact energy

NanoSpread.name: NanoSpread™
NanoSpread.headline: Reptilian Capillarity
NanoSpread.body: Dispersion technical textile with hydrophobic yarn nanotechnology. Keeps feet cool and dry, eliminating friction that causes blisters and reducing heat-related swelling.
NanoSpread.stat: Reduces internal temperature by up to 5°C (41°F)

ShockSphere.name: ShockSphere™
ShockSphere.headline: Focused Cushioning
ShockSphere.body: Technical low-density PU localized absorption points integrated into critical pressure zones. Provides intelligent suspension in the heel and metatarsals, adapting dynamically to the terrain.

ArchSystem.name: Arch System
ArchSystem.headline: Support Exoskeleton
ArchSystem.body: High-tenacity rigid reinforcement designed to integrate structurally with the LeapCore™ chassis. Prevents medial arch collapse under extreme fatigue from intensive shifts or heavy loads.
ArchSystem.stat: Optimizes movement leverage and energy transfer
